caption: In a formal indoor setting, two people are seated behind a white podium. On the left, a woman with dark hair and glasses wears a dark blazer over a dark green shirt. To her right, a man with glasses wears a light grey suit jacket, a white shirt, and a brown tie. He holds a handheld microphone in his right hand, positioning it near his mouth. As the sequence progresses, the man begins to gesture with his left hand, raising it and moving his fingers to emphasize his speech. The woman remains relatively still, with her hands clasped in front of her. Both individuals have small rectangular identification badges pinned to their lapels, though the text on them is not legible. The background consists of blurred figures and tiered seating, suggesting a conference or public hearing environment.
